title: Support OVM (@v2.1.2)
body:
(NOTE: I know there's still some work to be done to fully enable the likes of OVM/UVM support, but I want to help narrow down the work that needs doing)

Verilator 4.227 devel rev v4.226-17-g45d622e4
macOS arm64

### First Error

When trying to run the "hello_world" example from the OVM 2.1.2 kit, I receive the following syntax error from `ovm_component.sv:653:18`:

```
%Error: /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_component.sv:653:18: syntax error, unexpected IDENTIFIER
  653 |   process::state ps;
      |                  ^~
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_registry.svh:283:1: ... note: In file included from ovm_registry.svh
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_factory.sv:1058:1: ... note: In file included from ovm_factory.sv
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_transaction.sv:333:1: ... note: In file included from ovm_transaction.sv
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_report_handler.svh:610:1: ... note: In file included from ovm_report_handler.svh
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_report_server.svh:407:1: ... note: In file included from ovm_report_server.svh
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_barrier.svh:208:1: ... note: In file included from ovm_barrier.svh
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_event.svh:358:10: ... note: In file included from ovm_event.svh
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_event_callback.svh:87:1: ... note: In file included from ovm_event_callback.svh
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_recorder.svh:208:1: ... note: In file included from ovm_recorder.svh
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_packer.sv:491:1: ... note: In file included from ovm_packer.sv
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_printer.sv:1086:1: ... note: In file included from ovm_printer.sv
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_pool.svh:337:59: ... note: In file included from ovm_pool.svh
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_object.sv:1320:1: ... note: In file included from ovm_object.sv
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_misc.sv:517:1: ... note: In file included from ovm_misc.sv
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/base.svh:25:68: ... note: In file included from base.svh
        /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/ovm_pkg.sv:24:16: ... note: In file included from ovm_pkg.sv
```

Why would Verilator see this as a syntax error? Is it something to do with the use of namespacing for `process::state`?

### An extended "case-study" of OVM problems

#### Error 2 
```
%Error: /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_callback.svh:128:42: syntax error, unexpected IDENTIFIER, expecting ')'
  128 |   virtual function void add_cb(T obj, CB cb, bit append=1);
      |                                          ^~
```


#### Error 3
```
%Error: /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_callback.svh:130:5: syntax error, unexpected if
  130 |     if (obj == null) begin
      |     ^~
```


#### Error 4
```
%Error: /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_callback.svh:156:5: syntax error, unexpected if
  156 |     if (obj == null) begin
      |     ^~
```

#### Error 5
```
%Error: Internal Error: /Users/benjaminmordaunt/Downloads/ovm-2.1.2/src/base/ovm_callback.svh:72:1: ../V3ParseSym.h:120: Symbols suggest ending TASK 'add_cb' but parser thinks ending CLASS 'ovm_callbacks'
   72 | class ovm_callbacks #(type T=int, CB=int) extends ovm_pool #(T,ovm_queue #(CB));
      | ^~~~~
```
